cards.title: The Laboratory
cards.text: AI Business Studio London was not built on client work. It was built on SILVER & ELEGANT — our own jewellery brand, run as a live laboratory. Every framework we bring to a client was first tested there, in constraint, precision and permanence. Pieces are designed by algorithm or by hand — some by both — and finished by a single master silversmith.

cards.title: Proven in Public
cards.text: In its inaugural year, the laboratory produced an official jewellery partnership with Paul Costelloe at London Fashion Week AW26. Ten pieces — the majority of them rings — were worn on the runway, with the show's stylist working directly from the studio's designs. Costelloe's team initiated the partnership after seeing the collection.

cards.title: The Physical Fidelity Protocol™
cards.text: The methodology behind it. The protocol governs the chain from generated visual to finished object, so the image a customer sees is the object they receive. Before anything is published or delivered, each finished piece is checked directly against the source render it was designed from. We don't publish a percentage. We publish the work — see it for yourself.
